_instructions: This cron job template triggers Bookfinder's weekly market scan. Update the channel ID and timezone from your bookforge.config.json before importing into OpenClaw.
name: Bookfinder: Weekly Market Scan

payload.message: WEEKLY MARKET SCAN — Follow your AGENTS.md instructions. Research profitable book opportunities across: 1) Amazon KDP — scan bestseller lists, new releases, and hot categories in your configured niches. Use Amazon autocomplete mining for keyword discovery. 2) IngramSpark — trending titles in wide distribution. 3) Goodreads — highest rated recent releases, reader demand signals, underserved niches. 4) Reddit — r/selfpublish, r/KDP, r/writing trending topics and reader requests. Mine reader language from reviews. 5) BookTok/Instagram — viral book trends, aesthetic trends, format trends. 6) Cultural signals — trending topics with book-worthy angles. DELIVER exactly 3 book title recommendations using the [BOOK-FINDER: WEEKLY-REPORT] format from BOOK_PIPELINE_WORKFLOW.md. For EACH recommendation include: Title and subtitle (keyword-optimized), Target KDP category + BISAC codes, Top 5 competing books with BSR and keyword themes, Demand score and underserved angle, Revenue potential estimate, KEYWORD INTELLIGENCE: 7 preliminary backend keywords with character counts and sources, category recommendations. Save full report to research/weekly-scans/ with today's date. Post report in #bookfinder, then notify Author in #author. Update WATCHLIST.md.
